hero.name: Juan Camilo Yonda Conda
hero.paragraph1: I build backend systems and AI-powered services on AWS that handle high-volume workloads, reduce infrastructure costs, and improve operational efficiency in real production environments.
hero.paragraph2: 5+ years delivering microservices, APIs, and intelligent systems using Java, Node.js, Python, and modern cloud architectures.

about.label: ABOUT ME
about.body: Software engineer with 5 years of experience building scalable microservices, APIs and cloud solutions. Focused on Applied AI Engineering: RAG pipelines, autonomous agents, MCP integrations and LLMOps — with emphasis on security, traceability and controlled costs.

items.title: QUANT AI MULTI-AGENT
items.description: Quant research multi-agent pipeline: Claude API tool_use, yfinance ingestion, Pydantic contracts between agents, walk-forward CV, Parquet + JSON logs — Python.

items.title: HOUSE PRICE PREDICTOR
items.description: Flask web app to estimate home prices: multiple OLS regression (statsmodels), statistical analysis, 95% confidence intervals, REST API, interactive Leaflet map — Saratoga Houses dataset.

items.title: BLOCKCHAIN TRACEABILITY
items.description: Tamper-proof supply chain records using blockchain + IPFS
